zh.Steyning Churchyard, Steyning, West Suss: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可斯易寧斯易寧 亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pellett於1510年之後出生在英國素可斯易寧時，他的父親Richard Pellett8515歲，母親Joan Wells8528歲。他於大約1535年與Eleanor Clere在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1554年被列為member of parliament 。他去世於1558年9月15日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國素可斯易寧。

zh-hans.Steyning Churchyard, Steyning, West Suss: 英国英格兰韋斯特 素可斯易寧斯易寧 亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Pellett于1510年之后出生在英国素可斯易寧时，他的父亲Richard Pellett8515岁，母亲Joan Wells8528岁。他于大约1535年与Eleanor Clere在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1554年被列为member of parliament 。他去世于1558年9月15日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国素可斯易寧。

nameMeanings.name: Pellett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): either from a pet form of the personal name Pell , or a metonymic occupational name for a furrier, from Old French pellet ‘fur’, a diminutive of pel ‘skin’. Compare Pelletier .

variants.name: Pell
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Pell, apet form of Peter .
English: metonymic occupational name fora dealer in furs, from Middle English, Old French pel‘skin’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pellett was born after 1510, in Steyning, Sussex, England, his father, Richard Pellett, was 8515 and his mother, Joan Wells, was 8528. He married Eleanor Clere about 1535, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. In 1554, his occupation is listed as member of parliament . He died before 15 September 1558, in his hometown, and was buried in Steyning, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pellett est né après 1510, à Steyning, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Pellett, avait 8515 ans et sa mère, Joan Wells, avait 8528 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Clere environ 1535, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. En 1554, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament . Il est décédé avant 15 septembre 1558, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Steyning, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Pellett nach 1510 in Steyning, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Pellett 8515 und seine Mutter Joan Wells 8528. Er hat um 1535 in England Eleanor Clere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1554 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament  aufgeführt. Er starb vor 15. September 1558 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Steyning, Sussex, England begraben.

Lui sposato Eleanor Clere circa 1535, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Nel 1554, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament . Morì prima del 15 settembre 1558, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Steyning, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pellettが1510年以後にイギリススセックスステイニングで生まれた時，父Richard Pellettは8515歳，母Joan Wellsは8528歳であった。約1535年にイギリスでEleanor Clereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。1554年，職業はmember of parliament と記録されている。彼は1558年9月15日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリススセックスステイニングにて埋葬された。

ko.Steyning Churchyard, Steyning, West Suss: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 스테이닝 스테이닝 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: William Pellett(이)가 1510년 이후 영국 수세스 스테이닝에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Pellett(은)는 8515세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Wells(은)는 8528세였다. 그는 대략 1535년 영국에서 Eleanor Clere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1554년, 그의 직업은 member of parliament 이었다. 그는 1558년 9월 15일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수세스 스테이닝에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Pellett nasceu após 1510, em Steyning, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Pellett, tinha 8515 anos e sua mãe, Joan Wells, tinha 8528 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Clere aproximadamente 1535, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Em 1554, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament . Ele faleceu antes 15 de setembro de 1558, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Steyning, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.Steyning Churchyard, Steyning, West Suss: стининг чурчярд, стининг, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pellett родился после 1510 г. в местности стининг, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Pellett было 8515 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Wells, 8528. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Clere около 1535 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. В 1554 году он работал по профессии member of parliament . Он умер перед 15 сентябрь 1558 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности стининг, суссекс, Англия.
